rulings.Case Title: EDWARD TOWLE et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant General Cable Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is continued to November 30 per defendant¿s notice filed September 8. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD SHORTALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4, Defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc.¿s demurrer to plaintiff¿s false representation cause of action is off calendar because plaintiff has dismissed that cause of action. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD SHORTALL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4, Defendant Cahill Contractors, Inc.¿s motion to strike portions of plaintiff¿s complaint related to punitive damages is granted with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff did not file a substantive opposition but just requested leave to amend. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
